description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, short sleeves, and logo printed on the left chestFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureCool ironDo not dry cleanRun those marathons in ease with this ultra-comfortable cotton T-shirt from puma. Designed to wick sweat away and keep you fresh and comfortable all day, this T-shirt looks great with capris and sneakers. Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
